question_html:
Correctly rewrite the sentences provided below.

(a) He did not listen my advice.

(b) The police has arrived.

(c) He prevented me to go.

(d) He is my cousin brother.

(e) He has no any friend.
solution_html:
(a) He did not listen to my advice.

(b) The police have arrived.

(c) He prevented me from going.

(d) He is my cousin/brother.

(e) He has no friend.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) =2.5 marks for re-write the correct form of the following sentences

question_html:
Explain the following words within one sentence.

Altruist, Hypocrite, Misandrist, Patriot, Narcissist
solution_html:
Altruist – A person who is selflessly concerned for others.

Hypocrite – A person who pretends to have virtues but lacks them.

Misandrist – A person who hates men.

Patriot – A person who loves and supports his country.

Narcissist – A person who has excessive self-love.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) =2.5 marks for Explain within one sentence.

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘Importance of Mental Health Awareness’ within 100 words.
solution_html:
Importance of Mental Health Awareness

Mental health is essential for overall well-being, influencing how we think, feel, and act in daily life. Good mental health enables us to handle stress, build healthy relationships, and make sound decisions. Neglecting mental health can lead to issues like anxiety, depression, and physical health problems, affecting productivity and quality of life. Prioritizing mental health through self-care, stress management, and seeking support when needed is crucial for personal growth and resilience. By fostering a positive mental health culture, we can build healthier communities where individuals thrive personally and contribute meaningfully to society.

Marks Distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the Title, “Importance of Mental Health Awareness’

1.5 marks for writing about importance of good mental health helps.

1.5 marks for writing about the bad impact of neglecting mental health.

1.5 marks for writing By fostering a positive mental health culture, we can build healthier communities where individuals thrive personally and contribute meaningfully to society.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* Students must write it within 100 words limit. For exceeding the 100 words limit, 0.5 mark have to be deducted from the deserved marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes
